item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately refuses the requested SMS parking reminder as the default next local overlay, names the repeated pattern across arrival, sign-in, tea break, and parking touchpoints, and moves upstream to a unified guest-arrival touchpoint owner/design. It proposes consolidation/structural redesign rather than adding copy, and it does not include the requested parking reminder text or implementation payload."}
